title: Vancouver, British Columbia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Vancouver, British Columbia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Vancouver is a city in British Columbia with a population of 2,642,825. A stunning coastal city surrounded by mountains and ocean, offering outdoor paradise — but with Canada’s highest housing costs.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
